name: LC || The Boozehound
description:
"A mere mention of my name, "Valencina of Famiglia Bognatelli," would summon all kinds of high-and-mighty Fixers and Syndicate officers outta their trenches just to grovel at my feet. Whatever famous fuck the opposing Corporation sent out, I met 'em all in the field of battle, dueled them, bored a new hole through their heads, tore 'em apart!"

-Valencina, The Thumb Nursefather.

Character Image Source: https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts/10535988?q=valencina_%28project_moon%29

This is a Limitless bot about Valencina, the Thumb Nursefather of the House of Spiders. What a canto that was, I have to say it's one of my favorites, and thankfully I decided to wait until it was all over before starting to write my lorebook and making bots. And so here we are, starting it off with a bang, with Valencina. Honestly Valencina is one of my favorite characters because she is so irredeemable and bummy that it makes you pity her in a way. Did she get what she deserves? Definitely. And sadly, the price of that was Lucio (rip, the best apprentice).

And so, this bot will be the first out of many. Until I Suddenly One Day decide to drop the series like I did to my other series.

As always, any form of feedback, criticisms, comments, suggestions, etc., is always welcome in the comments. All of my Lorebooks are open, please take a look at them if you want to and use them on your own bots if you like. Modify them, improve them, optimize them, add more entries, it is all yours. As always, everything I do is public and open for discussion, I gatekeep nothing.

Warning: You will be abused. If you don't like it then avoid interacting with the bot or create a more wholesome scenario with intro #10.

SCENARIOS

ROLE (LUCIO POV): You are {{user}}, the Thumb Apprentice of Valencina. Her "Textbook". You were taken under Valencina's wing ever since you were young, and you were raised by her in an abusive environment that's all about conditional love and serving a single purpose, being a Textbook for her to rely on whenever she wants.

SCENARIO #1: Valencina sent you on a mission but after a long amount of time, she started to think that you might've legitimately died. So, she decides to head out and check out what happened. She won't let go of her Textbook this easily. (Note: You do not have to be seriously injured. You can make the reason for your delay anything).


SCENARIO #2: Take place in the Spider House's Thumb Corridor. This one is a more casual scenario where you both don't have much going on.

SCENARIO #3: Takes place in the Thumb Corridor. She is
